summary: Iteration 3 retest after the useCityWhispers fix. Backend pytest 39/39 still green. Frontend render-loop is FULLY RESOLVED — 0 'Maximum update depth' warnings and 0 console errors throughout the entire mobile session (Listen mount, ghost walk run, navigation, onboarding, language switch, admin edit). Ghost walk produces motes within 12s and auto-opens the POI drawer with full fields (image, name, address, hours, italic opening line, story) when the found-zone is reached (~30s). Admin /admin lists 18 POIs and POIForm exposes 5 interest-tag chips and 7 per-language opening-line inputs (en/it/es/de/el/fr/pt). Discoveries page lists 9 items with FOUND/SENSED uppercase badges plus the italic per-language opening line. New user register → 3-step onboarding (language → interests with 3-to-5 gate enforced → notifications skip) → lands on / (Listen). Profile language switch to Italiano persists on reload — title becomes 'Brera ti sta ascoltando…' and copy 'Cammina. Aspetta. La città sussurrerà…'. Old routes /favorites and /visits no longer match (router renders blank), no nav links present. Bottom nav correctly hidden on /login, /register, /onboarding.

issues: The geolocation fallback string 'Location is off — try the ghost walk to feel how it works.' is not translated; remains English even when language=it. Minor i18n gap; everything else (h1, copy, compass labels via component, etc.) translated correctly.

Made with Emergent badge sits directly on top of the 'Ghost walk' / 'Whispers on' pill in the 390px viewport, causing pointer-event interception during automation (had to dispatch via JS or hide the badge to click). Real users on mobile may experience an awkward tap target near the bottom-right corner. Consider raising the controls 12-16 px or moving the badge.

action_items: (Optional, minor) Translate the geo-fallback 'Location is off — try the ghost walk to feel how it works.' for non-en languages (it/es/de/el/fr/pt).
(Optional, minor) Lift bottom Listen-page controls above the Made-with-Emergent badge so the Ghost-walk pill is not partially covered on narrow viewports.
(Carry-over from iter 2, not blocking) Split /app/backend/server.py (>700 lines) into routers/auth.py, routers/pois.py, routers/me.py, seeds.py.
critical_code_review_comments: useCityWhispers fix is sound: trigger() uses onFoundRef/languageRef/notifRef so the function identity stays stable; setSightings now bails when content (rounded distance/bearing/zone/poi.id arrays) is unchanged. This eliminated the infinite render loop verified earlier. Recommend adding a regression unit test (React Testing Library) that mounts ListenPage and asserts no console.error of 'Maximum update depth' over 5s with ghostOn=true.
Discoveries.upgraded semantics — backend now correctly returns upgraded:true only when zone increases and false otherwise. Verified in pytest TestDiscoveries. Good fix on the iter-2 review note.
POIForm UX nit: per-language opening_line inputs are stacked vertically without showing the language NAME (only ISO code). Fine for admins but consider tooltip on hover (en → English, it → Italiano).
test_credentials: admin@brera.app / BreraAdmin2026! verified. New TEST_<uuid>@example.com / Sekret123! users registered cleanly.
seed_data_creation: None added beyond seeded 18 POIs and 9 ephemeral discoveries created by the admin's ghost walk during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-3 retest items pass. Use `cd /app && ADMIN_PASSWORD='BreraAdmin2026!' python -m pytest backend/tests/test_brera_backend.py -v` for backend regression. For frontend, hide #emergent-badge before clicking the Listen-page bottom pill controls, and use [data-testid="onb-next"] / [data-testid^="onb-interest-"] / [data-testid^="onb-lang-"] / [data-testid^="profile-lang-"] / [data-testid="profile-save"] / [data-testid^="admin-row-"] / [data-testid^="admin-edit-"] / [data-testid^="admin-form-tag-"] / [data-testid^="admin-form-opening-"] / [data-testid="poi-drawer"] / [data-testid="poi-drawer-close"] / [data-testid="ghost-walk-toggle"]. Admin Italiano test: language buttons are [data-testid="profile-lang-it"] etc.
rca of the issue: Iteration 2 RCA was confirmed: trigger() in useCityWhispers was rebuilt every render because its useCallback deps included primitives that changed each tick, and setSightings(newArray) emitted a new array reference every call which fed back into a useEffect dep, producing the loop. Fix path now in place: refs (onFoundRef, languageRef, notifRef) hold mutable subscriber values instead of including them in deps; setSightings short-circuits when the content (distance rounded to whole meters, bearing rounded to integer degrees, zone string, poi.id) is unchanged; zone radii are memoised with primitive deps. Verified by 0 console errors over the full 30-second ghost walk plus subsequent navigation.
